item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Chicken curry with jasmine rice, a classic we all know and love. Coriander on the side, don't worry. (6+11+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Tofu and tempeh in curry sauce, served with jasmine rice and coriander on the side. (6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Hong Kong curry fish balls on stir-fried noodles with vegetables, topped with bean sprouts and sesame seeds. Served with Cantonese chilli oil and steamed daikon salad with soy dressing. Also available gluten-free. (1+2+3+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Crispy falafel with Hong Kong curry sauce on stir-fried noodles with vegetables, topped with bean sprouts and sesame seeds. Served with Cantonese chilli oil and steamed daikon salad with soy dressing. Also available gluten-free. (1+2+3+7+8+15)
